meaning: adj.活跃季节前的,旺季前的
examples: Daniel Orton's knee will cause him to miss the preseason.
The stricter approach is to begin next month in the preseason.
We are now having a preseason sale on all our winter apparel.
The deal brought United over for its first preseason tour of the U.S. in 2003.
Consider that most teams play 2 preseason games at home, and there are 32 teams.
